title: Original Shield Recipe
description: Back when 15w33c came out the devs had some different ideas for the recipe!
body:
# Original Shield Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

On 14 August 2015, 15w33c a spanshot for 1.9 was released introducing the shield with this original recipe, 3 wool, 3 planks, and a iron ingot. However, on 10 September 2015, 15w37a was release changing the recipe to what it is today.

You will need 3 wool of any variant, 3 planks of any variant, and a iron ingot to make the shield.

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af99197fe8e486a5be0536a344bcb6847655537f.png)
